title: mesostemma perfoliatum
intro: Mesostemma perfoliatum, also known as the prickly chaff flower or hairy perfoliate, is a plant species that belongs to the bignoniaceae family. Traditionally, the plant is used in Ayurvedic medicine, where its leaves and flowers are valued for their medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and digestive issues. The plant is believed to possess anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Mesostemma perfoliatum can be consumed as a herbal tea, decoction, or powder, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
